title: Peep Client GUI
description: A clean and modern dark GUI for Minecraft
body:
Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/peep-client-gui

Peep Client GUI is a clean and modern dark GUI texture pack for Minecraft.
 

*Optifine is recommended while using this texture pack, but is not required*


Modded Support -----------------------------------------

Currently the only modded support currently implemented is with Mod Menu, but more support is planned in the future for mods such as JEI and Xaero's Minimap and World Map


All Supported Mods ------------------------------------

Mod Menu

 
Versions --------------------------------------------------

Versions 1.9 - 1.20.1 are supported

 1.6.1 - 1.8.9 is planned for the future
